title: Visual Details
description: Vanilla Plus modpack based on the visual style inspired by [Action & Stuff]
body:
![⚠️ Suspicious Content](https://i.postimg.cc/RhkJTLDC/a.gif) [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1139163/description_8a0b0c2e-4204-4320-81e3-1b734766c1f1.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sgodproject/projects) ***

Description

Dive into a completely revamped visual experience with "Enhanced Minecraft", Visual Details is a vanilla plus modpack focused on the visual experience, based on the Minecraft Bedrock add-on [Action & Stuff]. The main idea behind this modpack is to update it over time, implementing the latest visual mods as they come out to make the game look visually appealing. We will also add mods based on the opinions of the Minecraft community that add variety to the game, such as new biomes, structures, mobs, etc.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1139163/description_acc65c24-e695-4e3f-9b78-832bc76851c2.png) ***

Features

✅ Fully Optimized: 100% optimized game
✅ Shader support: Implement any shader into the game
✅ Visually enhanced: Effects and animations
✅ Constant updates: Constant updates to the modpack

![banner2](https://i.postimg.cc/1tHwCx1Q/1014-2.gif)
***

Possible Questions

## Why do you think I should play this modpack? Although this modpack appears very vanilla, I believe that the immersive experience based on the effects and animation mods makes the vanilla experience more enjoyable. We will also be updating the game and adding mods that you yourselves think would be good for vanilla Minecraft. ## What version is the modpack? The version is 1.21.5. Although it is not the latest version, this modpack includes and will include all the latest updates we receive from Mojang, as we will be implementing mods that carry the latest Mojang updates for version 1.21.5 to keep the modpack up to date. ## Will the modpack be updated? Yes. At the moment, there aren't many extras that aren't in vanilla Minecraft, but I will be implementing updates that I think are a good addition to the base game, while always maintaining the vanilla essence.
![⚠️ Suspicious Content](https://i.postimg.cc/rs5mnxry/14-2-1.gif)
